name: CUT-canon-intake: account-detachment ruling sec-4 deltas into identity canon (OQ-11)
description: EXECUTION GATE: after the new-llm merge (the decision record _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-account-detachment-decision-capture.md arrives on main with it). Ruled at ratification (OQ-11, operator confirmed 2026-06-13): execute the five canon deltas the decision capture's sec-4 specifies, lockstep with the decision record per MMT-ADR-0000: (1) vocabulary fix - rename the managed->credentialed login transition 'account-detachment' (ontology inv 20 + PRD R4 + domain-model sec-5 row 1); reserve 'graduation' for the consent-capability crossing; 18-crossing stays its own threshold; (2) record 13 as the child-claimable detachment age (inv 13 floor); (3) split PRD R4 into R4a account-detachment / R4b graduation; (4) add supporter-ceiling + notes-wall + proxy-no-entry rulings to PRD Part 10; (5) record de-credential as disallowed (one-directional). Docs-only; one PR; no schema or code change.
acceptanceCriteria: All five sec-4 deltas present in docs/canon/identity/*; decision record referenced from each edit; no 'graduation' usage left naming the login transition (grep-verified); PR merged.
riskImpact: Medium: canon contradicts a ratified ruling until landed; blocks nothing in CUT-A/B.
bodyText:
Completion Summary — 2026-06-13
**What was done:** Landed the five ratified identity-canon deltas from the 2026-06-09 account-detachment ruling (OQ-11, operator-confirmed 2026-06-13), docs-only, in one PR (#1095). Each edit lockstep-references the decision record `_wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-account-detachment-decision-capture.md` per MMT-ADR-0000. Two Codex review findings (P1 Supportership-gating, P2 age-floor reconciliation) were addressed, replied in-thread, and resolved.
**What changed (3 files — `docs/canon/identity/{ontology,prd,domain-model}.md`; `data-model.md` untouched, no CUT-A overlap):** (1) Vocabulary fix — renamed the managed→credentialed login transition to **account-detachment** (ontology inv 20, prd Part 1/Part 6/R4a, domain-model §5 row 1); reserved **graduation** for the consent-capability crossing (inv 16); the 18-crossing kept as its own named threshold (domain-model §5 row renamed off "graduation"). (2) Recorded **13** as the child-claimable detachment floor (ontology inv 13, domain-model §3), reconciled to one truth: 13 is the floor, per-jurisdiction/app-store policy may raise (stricter) but never lower below 13. (3) Split PRD **R4** into R4a (account-detachment — action-triggered) / R4b (graduation — consent-capability crossing, time-triggered). (4) Added to PRD **Part 10** the supporter-ceiling + notes-wall + proxy-no-entry rulings, with detached-guardian summary visibility qualified to require a valid **Supportership edge** (inv 9/15) — consent-authority alone grants no visibility (MMT-ADR-0008 suppresses derived guardian `view` once the charge has a Login). (5) Recorded **de-credential as disallowed** (one-directional, PRD Part 10), wording fixed off "graduation".
**Verification:** CI terminal and green at the gate (operator-confirmed) — Playwright/E2E Web pass, API Quality Gate pass, Merge completeness pass, CodeRabbit pass; `claude` check SKIPPED (change-class router skips LLM review for docs-only — expected). Both Codex review threads resolved; 0 unresolved threads. Diff scope = the 3 canon files only. Grep-verified `rg -i graduation docs/canon/identity/` → no occurrence names the managed→credentialed login transition (all hits are the inv-16 consent-capability crossing or the `graduation-pre-org-choice` interim-state name). PR #1095, head `bacc1ee08`.
**Caveats / Follow-ups:** (1) The `graduation-pre-org-choice` code-state name still uses "graduation" for the 18-crossing (not the login transition) — a deferred code-rename follow-on, out of this docs-only WI's scope. (2) Merge is pending an operator admin-merge ruling — PR #1095 is green but branch-protection-BLOCKED because the required `main` check does not trigger for docs-only changes (workflow-routing drift, not failing code). Merge authority held by operator; this WI does not merge.
Completion Summary — 2026-06-13
**What was done:** Landed the five ratified identity-canon deltas from the 2026-06-09 account-detachment ruling (OQ-11, operator-confirmed 2026-06-13), docs-only, in one PR (#1095). Each edit lockstep-references the decision record `_wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-account-detachment-decision-capture.md` per MMT-ADR-0000. Two Codex review findings (P1 Supportership-gating, P2 age-floor reconciliation) were addressed, replied in-thread, and resolved.
**What changed (3 files — `docs/canon/identity/{ontology,prd,domain-model}.md`; `data-model.md` untouched, no CUT-A overlap):** (1) Vocabulary fix — renamed the managed→credentialed login transition to **account-detachment** (ontology inv 20, prd Part 1/Part 6/R4a, domain-model §5 row 1); reserved **graduation** for the consent-capability crossing (inv 16); the 18-crossing kept as its own named threshold (domain-model §5 row renamed off "graduation"). (2) Recorded **13** as the child-claimable detachment floor (ontology inv 13, domain-model §3), reconciled to one truth: 13 is the floor, per-jurisdiction/app-store policy may raise (stricter) but never lower below 13. (3) Split PRD **R4** into R4a (account-detachment — action-triggered) / R4b (graduation — consent-capability crossing, time-triggered). (4) Added to PRD **Part 10** the supporter-ceiling + notes-wall + proxy-no-entry rulings, with detached-guardian summary visibility qualified to require a valid **Supportership edge** (inv 9/15) — consent-authority alone grants no visibility (MMT-ADR-0008 suppresses derived guardian `view` once the charge has a Login). (5) Recorded **de-credential as disallowed** (one-directional, PRD Part 10), wording fixed off "graduation".
**Verification:** PR #1095 MERGED to `main` via operator-approved admin-merge — merge commit `1c95743d4`; branch head `bacc1ee08` confirmed an ancestor of `origin/main` (`git merge-base --is-ancestor` passes). CI was terminal and green at the gate — Playwright/E2E Web pass, API Quality Gate pass, Merge completeness pass, CodeRabbit pass; `claude` check SKIPPED (change-class router skips LLM review for docs-only — expected). Both Codex review threads resolved; 0 unresolved threads. Diff scope = the 3 canon files only. Grep-verified `rg -i graduation docs/canon/identity/` → no occurrence names the managed→credentialed login transition (all hits are the inv-16 consent-capability crossing or the `graduation-pre-org-choice` interim-state name).
**Caveats / Follow-ups:** (1) The `graduation-pre-org-choice` code-state name still uses "graduation" for the 18-crossing (not the login transition) — a deferred code-rename follow-on, out of this docs-only WI's scope. (2) Resolved — PR #1095 was branch-protection-BLOCKED on the docs-only required-`main`-check routing drift (workflow-routing drift, not failing code); the operator cleared it via admin-merge (`1c95743d4`). The underlying required-check routing drift for docs-only PRs remains a separate platform follow-on, not owned by this WI.
